name: Factorial Energy Inc.
business: We are a blank check company incorporated on October 29, 2024 as a Cayman Islands exempted company and formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, amalgamation, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, or reorganization or engaging in any other similar business combination with one or more businesses or entities. We have initially focused on seeking high-growth businesses with proven or potential transnational operations or outlooks. We have no operating history and no revenues.
